title: Derpy Totem
description: This resource pack makes the totem of undying have a derp face.
body:
### Derpy Totem
Are you tired of an old totem of undying looking like a goofy old wizard. Well if you are this resource pack is amazing for you. It gets rid of the old totem face and gives it an awesome derp face.


### How to use:
1. Download the resource pack
2. Put the .zip into your resource pack folder in windows key + R then type: "%appdata%\.minecraft/resourcepacks" in the little box or load minecraft and drag it into the resource packs tab
3. Enjoy a nice derpy totem
